hero.subtext: We transform shipping containers into bespoke offices, homes, storage units, and commercial spaces.

about.heading: BUILT ON STEEL. DRIVEN BY PURPOSE.
about.paragraph1: Classic Container Fabricators Kenya was founded with a single mission: to deliver world-class container conversions that combine structural integrity with thoughtful design. From our Nairobi workshop, we serve clients across Kenya and East Africa.
about.paragraph2: Every unit we build undergoes rigorous quality checks — from the structural welds to the finishing paint. We source only verified shipping containers and use premium materials to ensure each conversion stands the test of time and climate.
about.pillar1_text: ISO-grade welding standards and certified materials on every build.
about.pillar2_text: We respect your timeline. Most builds complete in 4–8 weeks.
about.pillar3_text: No two projects are the same. We design to your exact specifications.

reefer.heading: REEFER CONTAINERS
reefer.description: Our reefer container solutions provide reliable temperature-controlled environments for food storage, pharmaceutical logistics, and cold chain operations. We convert and maintain refrigerated containers to the highest standards.

services.title: Used Shipping Containers
services.description: We source, inspect, and certify grade-A used shipping containers — 20ft and 40ft — ready for conversion or direct sale across Kenya.

services.title: Accommodation Units
services.description: From single-room staff quarters to multi-unit residential complexes — we build container homes that are comfortable, durable, and affordable.

services.title: Office Units
services.description: Modern, climate-controlled office containers with full electrical, data cabling, and finishing — deployed on-site in days, not months.

services.title: Commercial Spaces
services.description: Pop-up shops, restaurants, clinics, and showrooms — we turn containers into vibrant commercial spaces that attract customers.

services.title: Storage Solutions
services.description: Secure, weatherproof container storage units for construction sites, farms, warehouses, and logistics operations.

services.title: Custom Design
services.description: Have a unique vision? Our design team brings complex, multi-container builds to life — with architecture, engineering, and fabrication under one roof.

projects.title: Nairobi Tech Hub
projects.description: A 4-container open-plan tech office for a Nairobi startup — featuring exposed steel ceilings, high-speed networking, and a rooftop deck.

projects.title: Safari Camp Cabins
projects.description: 6 luxury container cabins deployed at a Laikipia safari camp, with solar power, ensuite bathrooms, and panoramic views.

projects.title: Westlands Coffee Shop
projects.description: A two-container café conversion in Westlands featuring floor-to-ceiling glass panels, custom wooden interiors, and a street-facing counter.

projects.title: Site Office — SGR Extension
projects.description: 12 portable site offices deployed along the SGR extension corridor — fully fitted with AC, data points, and sanitation facilities.

projects.title: Kilimani Apartment Block
projects.description: A stacked 3-storey residential building using 8 containers — each unit with a private balcony, modern kitchen, and city views.
